name: meeting2action
description: Company-safe Google Meet recording router for Eidos founder calls.

interface.shortDescription: Install and operate Eidos Meet recording routing.
interface.longDescription: Meeting2Action helps Codex install a company-owned Apps Script that copies new Google Meet recording/transcript artifacts from the organizer's Meet Recordings folder into the shared Eidos Founders Recordings folder.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me install or audit the Eidos Meeting2Action.
